title: Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act is a policy aimed at promoting the development and use of artificial intelligence (AI) in small businesses, possibly to increase innovation and competitiveness. However, the exact details of the policy are currently not available.

title: To require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to provide data privacy and security, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This policy document aims to establish requirements for artificial intelligence chatbot providers to protect users' data and ensure their security. The main purpose is to provide a framework of data privacy and security standards for these chatbot providers.

title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
summary: A US government pilot program is being set up at Arizona land border crossings to test the use of artificial intelligence and an anomaly detection algorithm. The program aims to assess this new technology for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at addressing the environmental impacts caused by artificial intelligence. However, with no description provided, the specific details and goals of the policy are currently unknown.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: This policy aims to help protect families from rising costs associated with energy used by AI data centers. The Act likely seeks to address the financial impact of AI's high energy consumption on household budgets.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 aims to address how artificial intelligence can be used to support the aging population. The exact details of the act are not specified, but it likely focuses on enhancing care and services for the elderly through AI technology.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
summary: This act aims to promote and support innovation in the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the financial services sector. It likely seeks to create an enabling environment for AI-based solutions to flourish in the financial industry.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: The Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act aims to create a regulatory framework that encourages the development of artificial intelligence (AI) in the financial sector. The goal is to balance innovation and oversight to promote safe and responsible use of AI in financial services.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act aims to safeguard consumers by preventing misleading and deceptive practices involving artificial intelligence. This act likely focuses on ensuring transparency and honesty in AI-driven interactions and transactions.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act is a policy that aims to assess and mitigate potential security risks associated with the development and deployment of generative artificial intelligence. This act likely seeks to prevent AI systems from being used for malicious or terrorist purposes.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This bill aims to amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 by requiring the establishment of a prize competition program for artificial intelligence. The program's goal would be to encourage innovation and advancements in the field of artificial intelligence.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 aims to regulate and manage the risks associated with the use of artificial intelligence in the United States. This act likely seeks to establish guidelines and oversight mechanisms for AI development and deployment to mitigate potential harm and ensure public safety.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act aims to evaluate and mitigate the potential risks of generative AI being used for terrorist purposes. This act is likely intended to assess and address the security threats associated with advanced AI technology.

title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 33 - 0.
summary: The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 is a policy document focusing on education, likely pertaining to Artificial Intelligence, with the National Science Foundation at its core. The policy aims to establish or regulate AI education initiatives within this scope.

title: LIFT AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 34 - 1.
summary: The LIFT AI Act aims to balance the benefits and risks of artificial intelligence by implementing regulations. Its specific details and goals are currently unavailable.

title: READ AI Models Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The READ AI Models Act is a policy that regulates the use and development of AI models. However, without further information, the details of the policy and its specific regulations are unknown.

title: Workforce for AI Trust Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Workforce for AI Trust Act is a proposed law aimed at ensuring AI systems are developed and used in a way that prioritizes workforce needs and job security. The exact details of the act are unclear due to the lack of a description.

title: CREATE AI Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 29 - 0.
summary: The CREATE AI Act of 2025 is a proposed policy that aims to regulate Artificial Intelligence and establish guidelines for its development and use, likely balancing innovation with safety and accountability concerns. The exact details of the Act are unknown since no description is available, but it may influence the future of AI research and application.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act is a policy document aiming to put a temporary halt on the construction of new AI data center facilities.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act is a policy that likely puts a temporary stop to the construction of new artificial intelligence data centers. This moratorium aims to control the development and usage of AI technology, possibly due to environmental or social concerns.

title: Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Voluntary Consumer AI Disclosure Pilot Act is a proposed law that aims to require developers to provide information to consumers about artificial intelligence used in products. This act would promote transparency and informed decision-making for consumers when purchasing or using AI-powered goods and services.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 aims to use artificial intelligence in a beneficial way. However, specific details of the act are not available in this limited information.

title: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services.
summary: The Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026 is a proposed law that aims to establish guidelines and regulations for the development and use of artificial intelligence. This act likely seeks to balance the benefits of AI with concerns about its potential risks and impact on society.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act aims to establish a system using artificial intelligence to assess and track heat emergencies. This act likely seeks to develop a method of predicting and responding to heat-related crises effectively.

title: Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Small AI Innovators Empowerment Act aims to support and empower small artificial intelligence innovators in various ways. However, since no specific details are provided, the exact nature of the support is currently unknown.

title: Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Rules and Administration.
summary: The Fraudulent Artificial Intelligence Regulations (FAIR) Elections Act of 2026 is a policy that aims to prevent the misuse of artificial intelligence in electoral processes. It likely seeks to ensure the security and integrity of elections by regulating AI usage and preventing potential fraud.

title: Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
summary: The Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence Act policy establishes a department responsible for developing and overseeing the use of advanced technology and artificial intelligence. The policy aims to ensure the responsible use and development of these technologies.

title: American Leadership in AI Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committees on Energy and Commerce, Agriculture, Oversight and Government Reform, Education and Workforce, the Judiciary, and Ways and Means, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The American Leadership in AI Act, a policy document likely from the US government, aims to establish guidelines and regulations for Artificial Intelligence development to maintain or increase American leadership in the field.
